infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CropAI needs camera access to capture crop leaf images for disease detection.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CropAI needs photo library access to select crop leaf images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CropAI uses your location to provide local weather and nearby supplier data.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CropAI needs microphone access for audio recording.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow CropAI to access your microphone.
